hours_saved_methodology: 2 contradiction(s) flagged x 6.0h avoided rework/coordination each, plus 0 duplicate RFI(s) matched instantly instead of manually researched x 2.5h each. Hours, not percentages, because the cost of a missed contradiction is engineer time spent re-litigating a decision, not a score.
